title: Longest Palindromic Subsequence
hints: Notice that a palindrome reads the same forwards and backwards. What if you compared the string with its reverse?
Consider dynamic programming. If the characters at the start and end match, they contribute to the length. If not, take the maximum of the inner substrings.
Define dp[i][j] as the longest palindromic subsequence in s[i...j]. Fill the table by increasing substring length, handling matching and non-matching ends separately.
